title: Men's Bubble Watch: Indiana, Texas will be sweating out Selection Sunday
content: The Hoosiers and Longhorns lost in their conference tournaments, leaving them right on the forecast cutlines.

title: Crosby commits after nixed trade: I'm a Raider
content: Maxx Crosby made his first public comments since the Ravens backed out of a trade that would've sent him to Baltimore, writing on X on Wednesday night, "Im a Raider. I'm back."

title: U.S. averts WBC disaster, advances with Italy win
content: Team USA advanced out of pool play in the World Baseball Classic and will face Canada in the quarterfinals, averting a disastrous flameout thanks to Italy's 9-1 victory against Mexico.

title: Source: Ament set to rejoin Vols for SEC tourney
content: Tennessee star freshman Nate Ament, out the past two games with a leg injury, is expected to play in the SEC quarterfinals against Auburn, a source told ESPN.

title: Judge card sets modern mark with $5.2M sale
content: A 2013 Aaron Judge one-of-one signed card sold for $5.2 million, eclipsed the previous record of $3.936 million for a 2009 Mike Trout card.

title: Clark back with double-double in Team USA debut
content: Playing in her first game since July, Caitlin Clark had 17 points and 12 assists in 19 minutes to lead Team USA to a 110-64 win in its first game of the FIBA World Cup qualifiers.

title: Court filing: Jackson feared Pearce 'will kill me'
content: WNBA player Rickea Jackson filed a petition for protection against her ex-boyfriend, Falcons player James Pearce Jr., saying she was "in fear of my life" and, if the court didn't intervene, she believed "James will kill me," according to court documents.

title: Senior who lost 3 in rink shooting lifts R.I. team
content: Colin Dorgan, the high school hockey player who lost three family members in a mass shooting at a Rhode Island rink last month, scored on a breakaway in double overtime to lift his Blackstone Valley Co-op team into the state final.

title: 🏈 Mid-free agency NFL mock draft: Top 10 picks
content: How has NFL free agency affected 2026 draft plans? Here are Field Yates' updated predictions for picks Nos. 1-10.

title: Live tracking NFL free agency: Updates on signings, trades, cuts
content: We're following NFL free agency signings, trades, cuts, contract restructures and other moves as they happen.

title: Ranking the best remaining free agents: Top unsigned players
content: Where could Aaron Rodgers and Deebo Samuel land? Let's stack the top free agents who are still available.

title: 127 games of dominance: The 20 wildest facts of SGA breaking Chamberlain's record
content: With Gilgeous-Alexander one game away from holding the most consecutive 20-point games in history, ESPN analyst Zach Kram breaks down the 20 most impressive stats about the streak.

title: Women's college basketball awards and All-Americans: UConn's Sarah Strong leads way
content: Mikayla Blakes made sure POY wasn't a one-player race, and Aaliyah Chavez had company in the FOY talk.

title: Caminero's dominant WBC debut -- and what it means for his Rays future
content: The young star is thriving on the international stage, setting himself up for a strong 2026 campaign.

title: Can the Knicks get Towns, Brunson on track? Five issues they need to solve -- fast
content: The Knicks are 42-25 and third in the Eastern Conference, but they have a few problems to solve if they want to make a deep playoff run.

title: Three takeaways from Team USA's win, Caitlin Clark's debut
content: Six players, including Clark, made their debuts for the U.S. national team. How did they look in USA's win?

title: Barnwell makes sense of Maxx Crosby trade, Ravens' ensuing Trey Hendrickson signing
content: Maxx Crosby was traded to the Ravens, the trade was called off and Baltimore signed Trey Hendrickson.

title: UCL talking points: Spurs simply awful as all Premier League teams fail to win
content: ESPN writers Mark Ogden, Sam Tighe, Gab Marcotti and Alex Kirkland break down the action as it happened, reflect on the first legs, and look ahead to next week's return fixtures.

title: Valverde's hat trick was the cherry on top of Madrid's performance
content: Federico Valverde put Madrid in pole position to advance and left Man City with a huge task at home next week.

title: Why Miami is facing its 'most challenging' offseason yet of the Cristobal era
content: Can Miami reach college football's mountaintop again? Mario Cristobal has the Canes ready to climb again.

title: Men's basketball coaching carousel tracker: Who could be up next at Arizona State?
content: The Sun Devils are moving on from Bobby Hurley after 11 seasons -- the sixth power-conference job to open.

title: WNBA CBA negotiations: Talks in 'right direction' after marathon meeting
content: League personnel and WNBPA staff met for nearly 12 hours Tuesday into Wednesday but did not reach a deal on a new collective bargaining agreement.

title: Tatum's return vaults Celtics, SGA adds distance in MVP race
content: The Celtics are now +550 to win the NBA championship, while Shai Gilgeous-Alexander is distancing himself in MVP race.

title: Ravens tied for second-shortest Super Bowl odds after whirlwind week
content: Every NFL team's team's win total, as well as odds to win their division, the conference and Super Bowl LXI.

title: NWSL ambition rankings: Which teams are raising standards, and which aren't trying enough?
content: The NWSL has teams that are building stadiums, signing stars and spending money. Meanwhile, other teams, well, aren't doing any of that.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal join Man City in race for Newcastle defender
content: Arsenal are considering an offer to sign Newcastle full back Tino Livramento. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Guide to NFL offseason signings: Can Geno Smith rebound from 2025 in New York?
content: Your one-stop shop for fantasy football reaction to all the key player movement via free agency and trades.

title: 'We make lot of money': Trump on rising oil prices amid US-Iran war
content: President Donald Trump said that US gains from higher oil prices. However, his main focus is stopping Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons. He described Iran as an "evil empire" whose nuclear ambitions threaten global stability. The conflict with Iran has entered its thirteenth day. The US has reportedly spent over $11.

title: LS showdown continues: Speaker stops Rahul mid-speech after his remark on Hardeep Puri
content: Lok Sabha witnessed a heated exchange as Rahul Gandhi's speech on the energy crisis was cut short by Speaker Om Birla. Gandhi was questioned for targeting Oil Minister Hardeep Singh Puri and deviating from the stated notice regarding gas shortages. The opposition had previously accused the Chair of limiting Gandhi's speaking time.

title: 'I don’t see a point': Pujara questions MS Dhoni’s batting position at CSK
content: MS Dhoni's batting position at CSK has sparked debate, with many believing he should bat higher to maximize his game-changing potential. Despite fitness concerns, his flashes of brilliance highlight his finishing ability. CSK CEO Kasi Viswanathan expressed confidence in Dhoni playing regularly, with the coaching staff to determine his exact role.

title: H-1B visa employers database offline, key public records disappear; USCIS responds
content: The U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) H-1B Employer Data Hub has gone offline, disabling key search tools and removing recent datasets. This public database, launched in 2019, allowed users to analyze H-1B visa sponsorship data. USCIS has apologized for the technical difficulties and is working to restore service.

title: 'Simply not ready': US says its military cannot escort vessels in Hormuz right now
content: America's military is currently unable to escort oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz. Energy Secretary Chris Wright stated that military assets are focused on Iran's offensive capabilities. Escort operations are expected soon, possibly by month's end. US forces have eliminated Iranian vessels suspected of laying mines near the strait.

title: Google completes Israeli cybersecurity firm acquisition, 2 years after CEO rejected deal
content: Google has finalized its $32 billion acquisition of Israeli cybersecurity firm Wiz, significantly expanding Google Cloud's security portfolio. This strategic move aims to enhance cloud security and enable secure innovation across all cloud and AI platforms. The combined entity will offer a unified security platform to improve threat detection, prevention, and response for organizations.

title: WC controversy: Pakistan's Mirza denies 'misbehaviour’, sends legal notice
content: Pakistan pacer Salman Mirza sent a legal notice to a news outlet and journalist over reports alleging he misbehaved with a woman during the T20 World Cup 2026 in Sri Lanka. Calling the claims “false, malicious, and highly defamatory,” Mirza denied wrongdoing. The PCB also dismissed the reports, demanding a public apology and warning of action.

title: Watch: Moment Iranian 'suicide boat' struck US-owned tanker
content: Iran's attack on the US-owned tanker 'Safesea Vishnu' near Basra has claimed the life of an Indian national, with 27 others rescued. This incident, occurring amidst escalating West Asia tensions, has led to the suspension of oil terminal operations in Iraq. India's External Affairs Ministry is prioritizing the welfare of its diaspora and coordinating assistance for stranded nationals.

title: 'He's like Messi or Ronaldo': Ex-England captain's jaw-dropping comparison for Bumrah
content: Michael Vaughan hailed Jasprit Bumrah as the finest bowler he's ever witnessed after his T20 World Cup final heroics.  Vaughan compared Bumrah's impact to football legends Messi and Ronaldo, stating his presence guarantees victory.  Fellow experts agreed, though Alastair Cook questioned his iconic Test spells, a point Vaughan countered with Bumrah's impressive overseas Test records.

title: 'Jaishankar spoke to Iran FM 3 times': India flags ships safety, energy security concerns
content: External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar held three recent talks with his Iranian counterpart, focusing on maritime shipping safety and India's energy security amid rising Middle East tensions. Iran has ensured safe passage for Indian-flagged vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial route for global oil trade and India's energy imports.

title: $256K in, what’s next for Nepal? Competitive cricket, infra boost and a hand from India
content: In the past two editions of the T20 World Cups, Nepal's fans have flooded the stands, be it in Texas or in Mumbai. The cricketers have shown the spunk, stomach for a fight, and pushed teams like South Africa and England to the brink. The Rohit Paudel-led team registered their first World Cup win in their third appearance, when they defeated Scotland at Wankhede. Now they must aim higher, but to achieve the summit of Mount Everest, they will need help.

title: Jana Nayagan release faces delay as OTT partner exits Vijay starrer deal
content: The digital release of Thalapathy Vijay's film 'Jana Nayagan' is in jeopardy. An OTT partner has withdrawn a Rs 120 crore deal. This follows ongoing delays in obtaining a censor certificate. Objections over certain scenes have led to a revising committee review. The film's theatrical release is now uncertain, potentially after upcoming elections.

title: Shadow voyage: How India-bound vessel crossed Strait of Hormuz
content: A crude oil tanker has reached Mumbai Port after navigating the Strait of Hormuz. The Liberia-flagged Shenlong Suezmax brought crude from Saudi Arabia. It temporarily went off tracking systems in the high-risk strait. Iran has intensified shipping restrictions. Over 20 million barrels of oil pass through the strait daily.

title: Hundred Auction: Pakistan's Rauf goes unsold, Afridi makes late withdrawal
content: Pakistan had a tough time at the 2026 Hundred auction. Haris Rauf went unsold, while ODI captain Shaheen Shah Afridi withdrew before bidding began. The ECB confirmed Quinton de Kock, Sunil Narine, AM Ghazanfar and Peter Siddle also pulled out due to schedule clashes. Earlier, no Pakistani women players were picked either, reducing Pakistan’s presence in the tournament.

title: 'You serious?': Sachin’s reaction after BCCI selectors told him it was time to move on
content: Cricket legend Sachin Tendulkar faced a tough phase in 2012. Poor form and team defeats led to discussions about his future. The BCCI selection committee chairman met with Tendulkar. This led to Tendulkar's retirement from ODIs and later Tests. He retired from international cricket after a long career, leaving behind numerous records.

title: T20 World Cup: South Africa, West Indies finally leave India after travel chaos
content: South African and West Indies cricket contingents have finally left India after days of travel chaos. Airspace closures in West Asia disrupted flights, stranding players in Kolkata post-T20 World Cup. The ICC confirmed the safe departure of the remaining 29 South Africans and 16 West Indians, concluding a complex logistical operation amidst challenging global travel conditions.

title: Shakti Mohan says she refused paycheck in 'very strict' Bhansali's 'Padmaavat'
content: Dancer Shakti Mohan shares her experience choreographing for Sanjay Leela Bhansali's film Padmaavat.  Her first big project was the song 'Nainowale Ne'.  Mohan found the opportunity overwhelming and chose not to accept payment.  She described Bhansali as a strict director.  Mohan also detailed working with actress Deepika Padukone on set due to tight schedules.

title: Why time is ripe for Suryakumar Yadav to follow in Rohit Sharma's footsteps
content: Suryakumar Yadav may have led India to T20 World Cup glory, but his leadership journey still draws heavily from Rohit Sharma’s blueprint. From aggressive cricket to backing players, Rohit's influence remains clear. Now, Surya faces the same defining choice his predecessor once made: step aside at the right time and secure a legacy not just as a champion, but as a visionary leader.

title: UP teen dies after mother, brother force her to consume poison over interfaith relationship
content: Ghazipur police have arrested a mother and son for allegedly killing the 19-year-old daughter. The duo reportedly acted out of anger over her relationship with a Hindu man. They are accused of forcing her to consume poison. The body was found in a field. The mother and son were apprehended while attempting to flee.

title: ‘He was very angry’: Surya reveals he apologised to Axar after T20 WC snub
content: India captain Suryakumar Yadav shared that Axar Patel was upset after being excluded from the playing XI during India's successful T20 World Cup campaign. Yadav apologised, calling it a team decision. The loss to South Africa became a turning point, prompting the team to treat all subsequent matches as knockouts. India then won their remaining games to secure the trophy.

title: Arbaaz Khan says father Salim ‘better now’, to be discharged soon
content: Arbaaz Khan shared that his father, veteran writer Salim Khan, is “improving” and may be discharged soon. The 90-year-old was hospitalised at Mumbai’s Lilavati Hospital on February 17 after a mild brain haemorrhage. Salim Khan, co-writer of classics like Sholay and Don, continues to recover under medical supervision.

title: Farooq Abdullah's 1st reaction after assassination attempt: 'Killer always has an advantage'
content: Former Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Farooq Abdullah narrowly escaped an assassination attempt at a wedding. A man fired shots at him, but his security team intervened, saving his life. Abdullah expressed gratitude to God and called for an investigation into the incident. He also commented on the prevailing atmosphere of hatred and the need for unity.

title: Reliance-backed oil refinery in US: What makes Trump’s ‘historic $300bn deal’ significant?
content: The proposed facility in Texas will be Reliance Industries’ second greenfield investment outside India. Reliance Industries, which has a market capitalisation of ₹18.82 lakh crore ($204 billion), runs the world’s largest integrated refinery complex at a single site in Jamnagar, Gujarat.

title: Liberia-flagged tanker ‘Shenlong’ carrying Saudi crude enters India via Strait of Hormuz
content: A Liberian-flagged oil tanker, captained by an Indian, successfully navigated the Strait of Hormuz to reach Mumbai Port. This marks a significant transit amid heightened Middle East tensions, with Iran reportedly granting safe passage to Indian vessels. Authorities are actively monitoring 28 Indian-flagged ships and seafarers in the Persian Gulf.

title: From 100 in 2013 to 1,900 now: How China's growing spy satellite network alarms US
content: A top US Space Force general warned that America must develop offensive capabilities in space to counter China's rapidly growing satellite network.  He emphasized that simply defending satellites won't suffice against potential threats.  The US is enhancing its ability to track and target, acknowledging space as a critical warfighting domain amidst rising global competition.

title: ‘Definitely a medal prospect’: Ex-CWG medallist backs Lakshya for LA 2028 medal
content: India's Lakshya Sen is considered a strong medal contender for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics after his Paris 2024 debut and a strong showing at the 2026 All England Championships. Former player Trupti Murgunde believes Sen is well-positioned but stresses the importance of sustained form, fitness, and wise tournament choices over the next two years.

title: Wedding halted in UP after 2 baraats reach minor bride’s house
content: A wedding in Muzaffarnagar took a bizarre turn when two grooms arrived with separate baraats, each claiming the bride. The ceremony was halted by officials and police after a child helpline alert about the bride's age. Families couldn't produce age proof, leading to the girl being taken to a one-stop centre for verification.

title: 'Mango man of India' who nurtures Modi, Aishwarya and 348+ other varieties of mango
content: Kalimullah Khan, the 'Mango Man of India', has cultivated a remarkable 125-year-old tree bearing over 350 distinct mango varieties. This Padma Shri awardee, who left school early, mastered grafting to create unique hybrids, even naming some after prominent figures. His dedication showcases a blend of traditional knowledge and innovative horticultural skill.

title: Kerosene makes a comeback? Oil firms plan backup as LPG shortage fears rise
content: Authorities are exploring a return of kerosene for kitchens in Uttar Pradesh. This is a precautionary step for a possible LPG shortage in the coming days. Oil companies are assessing if old kerosene distribution networks can be reactivated. The move is a backup plan for emergencies, not a policy change. The focus remains on ensuring cooking fuel access for households.

title: ‘No better feeling’: Bumrah reveals what makes him happiest on the field
content: India pace spearhead Jasprit Bumrah expressed immense joy in delivering under pressure, a mindset that fueled India's historic 2026 T20 World Cup triumph. His match-winning spell in the final, coupled with family presence and a sense of redemption at the Ahmedabad venue, made the victory deeply emotional and fulfilling for the spearhead.

title: Not just oil and gas: How the Iran war is disrupting six other key global commodities
content: Escalating conflict in the Middle East has disrupted global commodity markets beyond oil and gas, impacting aluminium, fertilisers, ethanol, and helium. Tanker movement through the Strait of Hormuz has slowed, with significant implications for essential goods and food exports.  Authorities are working to ensure food supply stability amidst rising logistics costs.

title: 'Rasikan' Hari Murali passes away at 27
content: The passing of 27-year-old Hari Murali has cast a shadow over the Malayalam cinema community. Discovered in his Payyannur residence, Murali, who first captured hearts as a child actor, is remembered not only for his film successes but also for his pursuit of graphic design after stepping away from the spotlight.

title: Iran's New Supreme Leader's Hormuz Mention And A Warning In First Remarks
content: Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, in his first statement since his appointment, said that the Strait of Hormuz must remain closed as leverage against the US and that the attacks on Middle East neighbours will continue.

title: Srinagar Court's Warrant Against Farooq Abdullah In J&K Cricket Body Case
content: A court in Srinagar Thursday issued a non-bailable warrant against Farooq Abdullah for not appearing before it after rejecting his exemption plea in a case related to multi-crore scam linked to Jammu and Kashmir Cricket Association (JKCA).

title: Elderly Man Kills Wife, Daughter-In-Law, Granddaughter With Hammer
content: An elderly man is on the run after allegedly killing three members of his family with a hammer following a domestic dispute in Odisha's Deogarh district.

title: NDTV Power Play Keralam Highlights | "Real Kerala Story Written In Our Communal Harmony": Pinarayi Vijayan
content: NDTV Powerplay Keralam Highlights: As Kerala's political conversation intensifies ahead of the elections, NDTV PowerPlay Keralam brings together the leaders and ideas shaping the state's political future

title: The Cuban Power Brokers US May Be Engaging With
content: U.S. President Donald Trump has said repeatedly the United States is in talks with high-level Cuban representatives, and that Cuba is eager to reach a deal to defuse tensions between the two neighbors that have deepened the island's economic crisis.

title: Growing Humanitarian Crisis in Iran Amid Hostilities Says UN Refugee Agency
content: Iranian families are fleeing conflict-affected areas amid rising insecurity and limited access to essential services. UNHCR emphasises the urgent need to protect civilians, maintain humanitarian access, and ensure borders remain open.

title: Iran Conflict "Strategic Challenge" With "No Good Choices": Ex-Top Official
content: Nearly nine million Indians live and work across West Asia-many in Gulf countries that could be affected by a wider regional escalation, the former Foreign Secretary noted.

title: India's Crude Situation Normal, Don't Panic-Buy: Centre On Middle East Crisis
content: The government today shared a stable picture of India's energy situation amid the US-Iran war, which has affected oil shipping.

title: Karnataka Forms AI Committee For Ethical Use Of AI In Governance
content: The Government of Karnataka has constituted a Committee on Responsible Artificial Intelligence to develop a framework for the safe, ethical and transparent use of AI across government systems and public services.

title: China Mediation Eases Fighting Between Pakistan And Afghanistan: Report
content: Chinese mediation efforts, including a message from President Xi Jinping, have helped ease the worst fighting between Pakistan and Afghanistan since the Taliban returned to power in 2021, three Pakistani government officials said.

title: Woman Kills Husband With Brother's Help. She Wanted To Marry Her Lover
content: A young man, who went missing in Maharashtra's Nashik district, was found dead, and the plot was hatched by none other than his wife.

title: Iran-Israel War LIVE Updates: Mojtaba Khamenei To Release First Message Soon
content: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Iran has allowed India-flagged tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz following talks between External Affairs Minister (EAM) S Jaishankar and his Iranian counterpart, Abbas Araghchi.

title: Bengal Governor RN Ravi Takes Oath, Exchanges Greetings With Chief Minister
content: West Bengal's new Governor RN Ravi took oath at the Lok Bhawan today. The ceremony lasted 15 minutes. The Calcutta High Court Chief Justice Justice Sujoy Paul, Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee, the governor's family members, and officials attended it.

title: Pak Has Zero Credibility When It Comes To Cross-Border Terrorism: Foreign Ministry
content: India on Thursday slammed Pakistan yet again, terming the country as the "state sponsor of terrorism for decades" which also has no credibility when it comes to cross-border terrorism.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Is Trump Starting To Regret Backing Netanyahu's Iran Gameplan?
content: Netanyahu may not mind the Iran war, as a prolonged conflict suits him politically. But for the US, it is fast shaping up to be a disaster.

title: "Heard A Cracker Sound": Farooq Abdullah To NDTV On Assassination Attempt
content: A day after he survived an assassination attempt, former Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Farooq Abdullah narrated how the incident unfolded at the wedding ceremony of a party functionary's daughter in Jammu yesterday.

title: Video: Moment Iran Struck US-Owned Ship With Indian Sailors On Board
content: Nighttime. Wartime. A ship. Then, a fireball. The night lit up, and the surface of the sea reflected bright yellow flames. It would have passed off as a scene from a found-footage Hollywood film.

title: Iranian Drones Strike Kuwait International Airport, No Casualties
content: Kuwait's international airport was hit by several drones on Thursday morning, leading to material damage, according to the country's civil aviation authority.

title: 'We Are Preventing Communalism In Kerala': Muslim League Leader To NDTV
content: Many hardcore elements in Kerala are trying to bring minority communalism into the political system, but the Indian Union Muslim League (IUML) is preventing that, the party's PK Kunhalikutty has said

title: "People In Kerala Now Believe BJP Can Win": Rajeev Chandrasekhar To NDTV
content: People in Kerala now believe the BJP and the NDA can win, and the BJP has been successful in shifting the state's political discourse towards development, state party chief Rajeev Chandrasekhar said at NDTV's Keralam Power Play today

title: The players Eric Karabell wants on his 2026 fantasy teams
content: rHP Logan Webb has never led the major leagues in any of these categories . he ranks third in wins and boasts a 3.22 ERA with a 1.17 WHIP . in a world in which precious few hurlers escape unscathed from serious arm injuries, Webb is the unicorn .

title: Bilas' All-America teams: My top 20 men's college basketball players of 2025-26
content: the quality of play has been spectacular . the only downer of the season has been the high-profile injuries to some of the truly great players in the game . phenom darryn Peterson has been, at times, the best .

content: the total ranks second all-time, trailing only Wilt Chamberlain's 100-point game . his 36 made free throws and 43 attempts set league single-game records . the 28-year-old dominated the Wizards from the opening tip, scoring 31 points in the first quarter .

content: collin Morikawa withdraws from the Players Championship . the two-time major winner and winner of the pebble Beach Pro-Am this season . morikawa had played only one hole in his opening round . he was one of the favorites at TPC Sawgrass .

title: The ACC's most important newcomers and what their teams are saying
content: a wave of new faces reshape the ACC every season . the addition of Malachi Toney via the high school ranks and timely portal additions such as Carson Beck helped springboard the Hurricanes to the college football playoff title game in 2025 .

content: new york Yankees general manager says he's excited to run it back with those guys . "run it back" part of the discussion rankled many uneasy with the Yankees' late-starting offseason . what does it look like? Can it work? What does it work even mean in this regard?

title: NHL playoff watch: Is Stars-Oilers a conference finals preview?
content: the Dallas Stars and Edmonton Oilers have met in the Western Conference finals . the teams have won both matches in 2025-26 . if Dallas wins that series, it will take on the winner of the first round .

title: DC assures no disruption in domestic LPG supply
content: The DC has urged the public not to panic or make unnecessary advance bookings, reiterating that there will be no disruption in supply

title: TTD fortifies LPG reserves amid West Asia war
content: To ensure uninterrupted Annadanam and laddu production at Tirumala, the temple administration extracts positive assurance from IOCL on continuous supplies, besides building a formidable reserve of 38 tonnes of the fuel sufficient to sustain operations for over a week even under adverse conditions

title: LPG shortage: police caution against spreading rumours
content: Warning follows misleading posts on social media claiming that LPG cylinders were becoming scarce and that prices had sharply increased due to international developments

title: Pinarayi government responsible for forest watcher’s death in elephant attack in Chimmini forest, says DCC president
content: Kumar, a forest watcher from Echippara tribal hamlet, killed in an elephant attack while on fireline duty in the interior forest near Palappilly on Thursday

title: A.P. signs MoU for ₹100-crore amusement park and resort project in Visakhapatnam
content: Proposed in 50 acres, the facility will have a luxury resort with 100 rooms, says Tourism Minister , adding that the project is expected to generate direct employment for 300 people

title: Preparations made to tackle likely drinking water crisis in Yadgir
content: The Deputy Commissioner, however, says that the three major reservoirs in the district have enough storage to meet the demand this summer

title: ‘Yoga Stops Traffick’ programme to be held on March 14
content: Yoga practitioners in countries like England, the United States, Australia, the Netherlands, Mexico, Sweden, France, Argentina, Estonia, Canada, Thailand, Ireland and Finland, among others, will join the international event

title: Forest watcher trampled to death by wild elephant in Chimmini forest
content: 42-year-old Kumar from Echippara tribal hamlet killed near Mangalam–Chimmini dam border during fireline work

title: Watch: What is the political logic behind the Women’s Reservation Act?
content: There has been renewed talk regarding the early implementation of the Women’s Reservation Act. Why is it being talked about now, what is the BJP and NDA’s plan, with an eye on elections in the following year?

title: Opposition flags school closures, judicial diversity, and 100% FDI concerns in Rajya Sabha
content: Members raise issues of Uttar Pradesh primary education vacancies, representation in higher judiciary and foreign investment in insurance during Zero Hour

title: Low LPG supply may drive demand for instant tea
content: Guwahati Tea Auction Buyers’ Association foresees a boost in sales of ‘energy-efficient’ tea bags due to the ongoing war in West Asia

title: Iran sets three conditions for talks with US as Middle East war rages on
content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock. title: Hotels to go for weekly closure as shortage of commercial gas looms large in A.P.
content: Hotel associations form a JAC to address the challenges and seek an enforcement mechanism to curb black marketing of LPG cylinders; star hotels may stop accepting online orders; restaurants to remain closed every Monday

title: Watch: MK Stalin: India’s ‘One Nation, One Election’ proposal gravely undermines federalism
content: Supporters of India’s ‘One Nation, One Election’ (ONOE) proposal argue that synchronising the Lok Sabha (general election) and State Assembly elections would reduce expenditure, limit prolonged security deployments, minimise disruptions caused by the Model Code of Conduct (MCC), and prevent political parties from remaining in constant campaign mode. But there are cautionary examples.

title: Regular health check-ups essential for maintaining kidney health, says NMC chief
content: On the occasion of World Kidney Day, Narayana Medical College and Hospital conducts a kidney awareness rally from Sarvodaya College Grounds to VRC Grounds

title: ‘Kaattu Thottappol’: First single from Mammootty-Mohanlal starrer ‘Patriot’ out
content: Composed by Sushin Shyam and sung by Sai Prabha and Kapil Kapilan, the track features Kunchacko Boban and Darshana Rajendran

title: UDF stuck in seat-sharing showdown in Kottayam
content: While four sitting MLAs are poised for re-election, consensus on five seats remains elusive;  uncertainty looms over whether the Congress can wrest the Changanassery and Ettumanoor seats from the Kerala Congress

title: AP-Genco records highest-ever generation on March 11, says Energy Minister Gottipati Ravi Kumar
content: Generation of 6,101 Megawatts on a single day has been made possible by the guidance of the Chief Minister and hard work of engineers and officials, he says

title: Deepfakes, manipulated content raise serious concerns over misinformation
content: Many were posted by ‘Pakistani propaganda’ handles, the fact-check unit of the Press Information Bureau says

title: Fuel shortage rumours spark panic buying at Tiruchi petrol bunks
content: Fuel dealers said that although there has been no official announcement regarding a shortage, panic buying led to a sudden surge in demand and urged people not to panic

title: Watch: What is the Come Early Go Early policy?
content: On Women’s Day, the Maharashtra government rolled out the Come Early, Go Early policy for women government employees residing in the Mumbai Metropolitan area. Why has it been introduced and who is eligible for it?

title: Entry of illegal street traders to be restricted in Kozhikode city soon
content: Action comes in the wake of complaints from licensed traders about huge losses due to illegal street trade

title: Can’t take it lightly: Rashmika Mandanna warns legal action against privacy-violating content
content: Rashmika Mandanna has reacted to a leaked audio of an alleged conversation involving her mother. The clip has reignited chatter about her past relationship with actor Rakshit Shetty. Rashmika has demanded the content be pulled down immediately

title: Consumers in Tiruchi feel the heat of rising firewood costs
content: According to reports, a 25-kg bundle of wood that cost ₹150 to ₹200 in late February, now costs upwards of ₹300

title: Shortage of industrial gases pushes fabrication units to the brink
content: BIDAS Industrial Services Association sources say there has been no supply of industrial gas from oil marketing companies in the past one week in the region

title: Over 110 sensitive railway stretches identified across the country to curb elephant mortalities, says Centre
content: Comprehensive joint field surveys, conducted by teams from Project Elephant, Wildlife Institute of India (WII), State Forest departments and Indian Railways, evaluated site-specific ecological conditions and proposed targeted mitigation measures tailored to each location

title: Women’s place in employment, higher education in T.N. proves their safety: Minister S. Regupathy
content: Mr. Regupathy said random incidents could not be generalised and used to allege that law and order had deteriorated in the State

title: Five KSU leaders who waved black flags at Kerala Health Minister get conditional bail
content: Case related to the alleged attempt to attack Health Minister Veena George and wave black flags at her at the Kannur railway station on February 25, 2026

title: Supreme Court dismisses plea seeking ₹1 crore as fee and expenses for filing cases to 'save' former CJI
content: A Bench of Chief Justice Surya Kant and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and Vipul M Pancholi said the petition was "totally misconceived"

title: TVK will contest all 234 Assembly constituencies on its own: Sengottaiyan
content: Dismissing speculation about the party holding alliance talks with the BJP, he alleged certain television channels and newspapers were publishing misleading reports about the party

title: Industry bodies write to Karnataka government about lack of clarity around welfare fee of gig workers
content: Associations cite a lack of clarity on the schemes the welfare fee would be used for, and a disconnect between the Karnataka Act and Centre’s Code on Social Security, 2020

title: Three houses destroyed, 12 damaged in cyclone-like wind in coastal Chellanam panchayat in Kochi
content: Roofs of several houses were flown away by the strong wind that struck the coast south of the Chellanam panchayat office around 1.15 a.m. Chellanam is the worst affected among the 10 identified hotspots of sea erosion in Kerala.

title: How Mizoram is making sexual health conversations easier with a youth-friendly café
content: SPOT cafe in Aizawl offers free HIV and STI testing, condoms and counselling in a relaxed atmosphere with a TV, karaoke and fun games

title: T.N. CM Stalin condemns assassination attempt on Farooq Abdullah
content: He said such acts of violence are unacceptable in a democracy and added he was relieved to know that Dr. Abdullah was safe

title: ED wants T.N. Minister Anitha Radhakrishnan’s assets case moved from Thoothukudi to Madurai
content: Madras High Court orders notice, returnable by four weeks, to the DVAC on the transfer petition filed by the central agency

title: CPI(M) ‘humiliated and forced out’ G. Sudhakaran, says Ramesh Chennithala
content: Congress leader describes ‘treatment’ meted out to Sudhakaran as a ‘grave injustice against a sincere communist’ who had served the party for decades

title: Kerala CM condemns assassination attempt on former J&K CM Farooq Abdullah
content: ‘It is a matter of grave concern how such a security breach occurred despite him having Z+ NSG protection’, says Pinarayi in a post on X

title: Women in agri-food sector should get greater role in policy formation, decision making: President Murmu
content: She called for targeted support for women farmers on issues of land titles, access to technical knowledge, and institutional finance

title: Farooq Abdullah links assassination attempt to ‘deeply rooted hatred’ in India, demands probe
content: Farooq Abdullah urges for a high-level probe into the motivations behind the assasination attempt; political leaders unite in condemnation of the violence

title: Held captive, 21 Nagas released in Manipur’s restive Ukhrul district
content: The bodies of two Kuki men were recovered from a jungle a day after they went missing when “Naga volunteers” reportedly opened fire

title: ‘Fuel stocks sufficient in T.N.’: CM Stalin urges calm as motorists crowd outlets
content: Retail fuel outlets across the city, as well as in other cities and towns in the State, have been witnessing a sudden spike in customer volume since Wednesday afternoon

title: Prepare plans for ring roads around Telangana dist HQs, study connecting them to NHs: Telangana CM
content: Telangana CM says land will be allotted for bus terminal near proposed high-speed rail corridor, wants only EV vehicles for official purposes

title: MP urges inclusion of Mysuru in ‘urban economic zone’ scheme
content: The scheme is aimed at improving modern infrastructure in Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities with a population of more than five lakh, as well as in major pilgrimage centres

title: Kumbh Mela fame Monalisa Bhosle defends interfaith marriage with actor Farman Khan in Kerala, rejects ‘love jihad’ claims
content: Monalisa Bhosle says the decision to marry Farman Khan was entirely her own and that she had insisted on the marriage despite initial hesitation from him

title: Is YSRCP treading a tough road?
content: Decimated from holding 151 seats in the Andhra Pradesh Assembly to just 11 in the 2024 Assembly elections, the YSRCP now appears to be fighting its way back to relevance as the leading Opposition force

title: The Saffron Empire: Mapping the RSS network
content: the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh’s network of organisations, unions, think-tanks, institutions and lobbies are working to realise its dream of making India a ‘Hindu Rashtra’ by Hindutva . the organisation was banned in the wake of Mahatma Gandhi’s assassination in 1949 .
